Variables.Name: MatineeData
Variables.Description: The matinee data used by this actor

Variables.Name: MatineeControllerName
Variables.Description: Name of controller node in level script, used to know what function to try and find for events

Variables.Name: PlayRate
Variables.Description: Time multiplier for playback.

Variables.Name: bPlayOnLevelLoad
Variables.Description: If true, the matinee will play when the level is loaded.

Variables.Name: bForceStartPos
Variables.Description: Lets you force the sequence to always start at ForceStartPosition

Variables.Name: ForceStartPosition
Variables.Description: Time position to always start at if bForceStartPos is set to true.

Variables.Name: bLooping
Variables.Description:
If sequence should pop back to beginning when finished.
	 	Note, if true, will never get CompletedReversed events - sequence must be explicitly Stopped.

Variables.Name: bRewindOnPlay
Variables.Description: If true, sequence will rewind itself back to the start each time the Play input is activated.

Variables.Name: bNoResetOnRewind
Variables.Description:
If true, when rewinding this interpolation, reset the 'initial positions' of any RelateToInitial movements to the current location.
	 	This allows the next loop of movement to proceed from the current locations.

Variables.Name: bRewindIfAlreadyPlaying
Variables.Description:
Only used if bRewindOnPlay if true. Defines what should happen if the Play input is activated while currently playing.
	 	If true, hitting Play while currently playing will pop the position back to the start and begin playback over again.
	 	If false, hitting Play while currently playing will do nothing.

Variables.Name: bDisableRadioFilter
Variables.Description: If true, disables the realtime radio effect

Variables.Name: bClientSideOnly
Variables.Description:
Indicates that this interpolation does not affect gameplay. This means that:
	  -it is not replicated via MatineeActor
	  -it is not ticked if no affected Actors are visible
	  -on dedicated servers, it is completely ignored

Variables.Name: bSkipUpdateIfNotVisible
Variables.Description: if bClientSideOnly is true, whether this matinee should be completely skipped if none of the affected Actors are visible

Variables.Name: bIsSkippable
Variables.Description: Lets you skip the matinee with the CANCELMATINEE exec command. Triggers all events to the end along the way.

Variables.Name: PreferredSplitScreenNum
Variables.Description: Preferred local viewport number (when split screen is active) the director track should associate with, or zero for 'all'.

Variables.Name: bDisableMovementInput
Variables.Description: Disable Input from player during play

Variables.Name: bDisableLookAtInput
Variables.Description: Disable LookAt Input from player during play

Variables.Name: bHidePlayer
Variables.Description: Hide Player Pawn during play

Variables.Name: bHideHud
Variables.Description: Hide HUD during play

Variables.Name: GroupActorInfos
Variables.Description: @todo UE4 matinee - shouldnt be directly editable.  Needs a nice interface in matinee

Variables.Name: bShouldShowGore
Variables.Description: Cached value that indicates whether or not gore was enabled when the sequence was started

Variables.Name: GroupInst
Variables.Description: Instance data for interp groups. One for each variablegroup combination.

Variables.Name: CameraCuts
Variables.Description: Contains the camera world-position for each camera cut in the cinematic.

Variables.Name: bIsPlaying
Variables.Description: properties that may change on InterpAction that we need to notify clients about, since the object's properties will not be replicated

Variables.Name: ReplicationForceIsPlaying
Variables.Description: Counter to indicate that play count has changed. Used to work around single frames that go from play-stop-play where bIsPlaying won't get replicated.

Functions.Name: Play
Functions.Description:
Begin playback of the matinee. Only called in game.
	  Will then advance Position by (PlayRate  Deltatime) each time the matinee is ticked.

Functions.Name: Stop
Functions.Description: Stops playback at the current position

Functions.Name: Reverse
Functions.Description: Similar to play, but the playback will go backwards until the beginning of the sequence is reached.

Functions.Name: Pause
Functions.Description: Hold playback at its current position. Calling Pause again will continue playback in its current direction.

Functions.Name: SetPosition
Functions.Description: Set the position of the interpolation.

Params.Name: NewPosition
Params.Description: the new position to set the interpolation to

Params.Name: bJump
Params.Description: if true, teleport to the new position (don't trigger any events between the old and new positions, etc)

Functions.Name: ChangePlaybackDirection
Functions.Description: Changes the direction of playback (go in reverse if it was going forward, or vice versa)

Functions.Name: SetLoopingState
Functions.Description: Change the looping behaviour of this matinee

Delegate.Name: OnPlay
Delegate.Description: Event triggered when the matinee is played for whatever reason

Delegate.Name: OnStop
Delegate.Description: Event triggered when the matinee is stopped for whatever reason

Delegate.Name: OnPause
Delegate.Description: Event triggered when the matinee is paused for whatever reason
